summary: 3 minor + 2 nit findings; no critical/major. Three reviewers each made the right call on their slice. Auditor verified codeanalyzer v4's escalated locale carryover is closed (commit cc8e638d), found the BuildingGuard removal commit's rationale references a guard that doesn't exist (documentation accuracy), categorized F4 reds (~6 foundation-shaped, ~17 module-domain), and noted security F2's leak-path enumeration missed FluidProvider:94. Original 3 coder gaps all implemented + tested.
